name: mlflow
description: Track ML experiments, manage model registry with versioning, deploy models to production, and reproduce experiments with MLflow - framework-agnostic ML lifecycle platform
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 mlflow 相關工作
幫我啟用 mlflow 這個 skill

examples.intent: Use the mlflow skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
